creator: volker@vwsoft.com
text:
On 12/23/-58 20:59, Per olof Ljungmark wrote:
>  Just an addendum, the following works very good for me on 7-STABLE. 
>  Changes to ubsa.c and usbdevs are very similar.
>  
>  In the original patch the PR says Huawei E220 but the pactes says E200B 
>  which I do not completely understand.

Per,

I don't own such a device, so I needed to rely on the original posting.
A quick search on other projects shows, PID 0x1003 is really an E220
device. Your device string in usbdevs seems to be the correct one.

Volker
